canonical_question: What is SAP Clean Core - Tier 1/2/3 extensibility model, ABAP Cloud, BTP side-by-side extensions?
aliases: SAP Clean Core extensibility levels A B C D explained
ABAP Cloud vs classic ABAP extensibility
SAP BTP side-by-side vs on-stack extensions
SAP S/4HANA custom code clean core compliance

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: 2025-08 — 3-tier model replaced with A-D clean core levels

constraints: ABAP Cloud language version restricts syntax to a defined subset — no classic dynpro, no direct SAP table writes
Only released APIs (from SAP API Business Hub / Cloudification Repository) may be used in Level A extensions
Wrappers for unreleased APIs (old Tier 2 pattern) now classified as Level B — not fully clean-core compliant
Level D extensions (modifications, implicit enhancements, NoAPI objects) may be blocked from transport in CI/CD pipelines
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition permits only Level A (on-stack key user + developer extensibility via released APIs)
BTP side-by-side extensions require separate BTP licensing — not included in base S/4HANA license

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Need specific OData API capabilities and rate limits for S/4HANA
Need BAPI/RFC/IDoc integration patterns for classic SAP
Need SAP Integration Suite middleware capabilities
Need SAP authentication methods (OAuth, X.509, SAP Logon)

depends_on.label: SAP Authentication Methods — required for BTP and API access

related_to.label: SAP S/4HANA OData API — the released API surface for clean core
SAP Event Mesh — async event-driven extensions on BTP
SAP Integration Suite — iPaaS for side-by-side integration

alternative_to.label: SAP BAPI/RFC Integration — classic (Level B/C) extension approach
SAP IDoc/EDI — classic interface (Level B in new model)

often_confused_with.label: SAP ECC vs S/4HANA — clean core applies only to S/4HANA

inputs_needed.question: Which SAP deployment model are you using?
What type of extension do you need?
options: Key user configuration (custom fields, logic, forms)
Migrating existing classic ABAP custom code

inputs_needed.question: What is your primary clean core objective?
options: Migrate existing extensions to clean core
